name: The First Song of Shan Lushan (Secret)

system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Talent (Singing or any woodwind instru - ment) against Resolve
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You sing or play a beautiful yet haunting piece of music, about the true desires of a person’s heart. On a Success the listener is filled with a gentle calm that sooths them, and produces feelings of gratitude toward the singer. This is nothing more than normal gratitude. Cathartic: This produces a hypnotic effect on the target, causing anyone affected to be dazed for 1 round per Rank of Neigong (does not work on anyone 2 or more Qi Ranks higher than yourself). In addition, anyone who has 2 Qi Ranks lower the user, is enthralled, willing do to that person’s bidding for 1 hour per Rank of Neigong.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Talent (Singing or any woodwind instru - ment) against Resolve
system.targetEffects: Listener is filled with intense longing or desire; GM adjudicates behavior from the entry
system.catharticEffect: This produces a hypnotic effect on the target, causing anyone affected to be dazed for 1 round per Rank of Neigong (does not work on anyone 2 or more Qi Ranks higher than yourself). In addition, anyone who has 2 Qi Ranks lower the user, is enthralled, willing do to that person’s bidding for 1 hour per Rank of Neigong.
